#REDIRECT [[Lifeism Wiki]]Lifeism is a new religion being founded as we speak. This wiki serves the purpose of documenting it and helping people withg terminology and ideas and how they connect. This wiki is not authoritative and you should go to https://evolution.faith for authoritative info. This wiki may contain errors or obsolete info and is actively being worked on.

These days though the YouTube channel is updated more and the website is outdated. But this is a research wiki

[[Category:Lifeism Wiki]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
